---
title: "Module 04: Tidymodels Pipeline"
---

- Learning objective: establish a reusable classification workflow in `tidymodels` on **Palmer Penguins** (Adelie vs Gentoo).
- Key message: recipe + model + workflow + tuning keeps experiments comparable — same table as [dataset-penguins](../dataset-penguins.qmd) and [penguins-classification.Rmd](../notebooks/penguins-classification.Rmd).

## Canonical code template

Maintained once for the whole course. The include is a **paced** deck: **concept slide → code slide** for each `tidymodels` step on Palmer Penguins, then figure slides with short reading notes (same content as Tuesday’s live walk-through).

{{< include ../_includes/tidymodels-pipeline.qmd >}}
